label: Mechanistic interpretability & circuit analysis

node.label: Mechanistic interpretability & circuit analysis
node.definition: Mechanistic interpretability studies circuits, features, attention patterns, sparse representations, and algorithmic structure inside trained neural networks.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Mechanistic interpretability & circuit analysis is modeled as depending on Feature attribution & interpretability, Ablation, interventions & causal analysis and feeding downstream nodes such as Observability, tracing & evaluation harnesses.
examples: atlas downstream link to Observability, tracing & evaluation harnesses
limitations: Coverage is necessarily incomplete: measured proxies, policies, and test suites cannot enumerate every deployment context or adversary. Its direct dependencies include Feature attribution & interpretability, Ablation, interventions & causal analysis.
